headline: Take the Zacks Approach to Beat the Markets: Citigroup, Seanergy, PepsiCo in Focus
summary: SHIP, C and PEP shine as Zacks highlights top stock picks driving gains amid easing tensions and a broad market rally.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Public Storage, Raises Price Target to $352
summary: Barclays  analyst Brendan Lynch   maintains Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $347 to $352.
